title: Custom Collumn Add-Ons?
excerpt: Is there a reason why we can only use the API to create new views or widgets? Being able to create customized columns but still fit with in the Monday ecosystem would make the platform 10x more versatile.

posts.author: zkendall (Zack Kendall)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a reason why we can only use the API to create new views or widgets? Being able to create customized columns but still fit with in the Monday ecosystem would make the platform 10x more versatile.
